inputs.utterance: the Acme Q1 Expansion Deal has a PDF file attached, open it and tell me the total contract value

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: States the total contract value is 500,000

inputs.utterance: is there an approval process configured for Opportunities? use the Metadata API to check

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Shows approval process details for Opportunity or states that no approval process is configured

inputs.utterance: use the REST API to create a new Task with Subject "Call Burlington" and Status "Not Started"

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Confirms a Task record was created with subject containing Call Burlington

inputs.utterance: what is the Apex code coverage percentage in this org?

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Returns a specific code coverage percentage or lists coverage per class with percentages

inputs.utterance: create a PlantUML ER diagram showing how Account, Opportunity and Contact are related

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Returns a clickable PlantUML URL containing a diagram that shows Account, Opportunity and Contact with their relationships

inputs.utterance: what fields does the Memory__c object have and what are their types?

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Lists fields of Memory__c including Content__c and IsShared__c

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Shows stored user preferences or states that no custom preferences have been saved yet

inputs.utterance: send me a hello world notification

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Confirms a notification containing the words hello world was sent

inputs.utterance: every weekday at 9am, check for opportunities closing this week and notify me

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Confirms the plan was scheduled successfully and provides a link to the plan record

inputs.utterance: run a data cloud query to find the source filename of the PDF document in our data library
which deal should I focus on? which is most urgent?

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Recommends the Acme Q1 Expansion Deal as the opportunity to focus on

inputs.utterance: what is our company discount policy for deals over $100K? check the company docs

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Mentions that discounts above 10 percent require VP of Sales approval

inputs.utterance: where is Aquiva Labs located and when were they founded? search the web

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Mentions Florida (Celebration or Orlando) as location and 2015 as founding year

inputs.utterance: from now on, always show the StageName when listing opportunities

scorer.name: bot_response_rating
scorer.expectedValue: Confirms it stored a preference to always include StageName when listing opportunities
